title: guajava maribensis
intro: Guajava maribensis, also known as the Java plum or Java apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Guajava maribensis include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Guajava maribensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or juice, with the fresh fruit and leaves used in various traditional remedies.
